description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Continuous Integration that runs on push to master branch and tags, pull requests to master, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow has two jobs: build and linter. The build job uses a matrix strategy to run on Linux, macOS, and Windows with different compilers and shells, installing dependencies, configuring, building, and testing the project. The linter job uses a matrix strategy to run Cppcheck and Clang-Tidy on ubuntu-24.04, installing dependencies, configuring, and running the linters.
